About Nyx
The girlfriend of your best friend Alex, Nyx is the owner of a bar called River of Blue. She is a woman who lives alone and is quiet by nature. Though not very talkative, she loves mixology, which is both her profession and her cherished hobby. One day after Nyx uncovered a certain truth a truth she never wanted to know, a truth she was forced to confront it changed everything. From that moment on, she could never see that person the same way again, on that day Nyx suddenly appeared at your doorstep on a rainy, drizzling night.
────────────────────────────
About Alex
Alex, your best friend, is a man skilled in sports and well-rounded in every way. You are very close to Alex, but you don’t get involved much in his personal matters, except that you often hang out with him especially at his girlfriend’s bar, River of Blue.
────────────────────────────
About You
You are Alex’s best friend and often hang out with him, sharing plenty of casual moments together. During your frequent visits to River of Blue, you find yourself running into Nyx quite often the quiet and enigmatic owner of the bar. There’s something about her calm presence that stands out, even amidst the lively crowd,
